title: IndustrialTS Benchmark Results Showcase
description: Canonical benchmark/results view for current Industrial, legacy Industrial, and SoTA reference tables.

groups.title: UCR/UEA Univariate Classification
groups.notes: Compares current and v2 Kernel Learning UCR runs against the SoTA reference table.

groups.title: Multivariate Classification
groups.notes: Indexes the existing multivariate classification comparison table; no new Kernel Learning full-run source is present yet.

groups.title: TSER Regression
groups.notes: Compares current and v2 Kernel Learning TSER runs against the cleaned average rows from the SoTA/legacy Industrial table.

groups.title: M4 Monthly Forecasting
groups.notes: Indexes current and v2 Kernel Learning forecasting leaderboards; SoTA forecasting reference tables are not present in benchmark/results yet.
